svg.content:
<mxGraphModel dx="1200" dy="800" grid="0" page="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="900"><root><mxCell id="0" /><mxCell id="1" parent="0" /><mxCell id="client" value="Client
(Browser / Mobile)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#37474F;strokeColor=#263238;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="380" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="apigw" value="API Gateway + Cognito" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E07B00;strokeColor=#B35F00;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="250" y="380" width="160" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="alb" value="Application Load Balancer" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E07B00;strokeColor=#B35F00;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="470" y="380" width="160" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="users" value="Users Service
Fastify (Node.js)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2E7D32;strokeColor=#1B5E20;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="700" y="120" width="170" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="orders" value="Orders Service
.NET Core 10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2E7D32;strokeColor=#1B5E20;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="700" y="380" width="170" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="tracking" value="Tracking Service
FastAPI (Python)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2E7D32;strokeColor=#1B5E20;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="700" y="640" width="170" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbu" value="Aurora
PostgreSQL" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3949AB;strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="960" y="110" width="90" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbo" value="Aurora
MySQL" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3949AB;strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="960" y="370" width="90" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbt" value="Aurora
MySQL" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3949AB;strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="960" y="630" width="90" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="sqs" value="SQS
(domain events)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C2185B;strokeColor=#880E4F;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="700" y="810" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="lambda" value="Events Pipeline
Lambda (Node.js, CQRS)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D84315;strokeColor=#BF360C;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="940" y="808" width="190" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="docdb" value="DocumentDB
(event store)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00838F;strokeColor=#005662;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="1210" y="800" width="100" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="cw" value="CloudWatch" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#6A1B9A;strokeColor=#4A148C;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="250" y="640" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="signoz" value="SigNoz" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#6A1B9A;strokeColor=#4A148C;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="250" y="760" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" value="HTTPS" style="strokeColor=#455A64;fontColor=#37474F;" edge="1" parent="1" source="client" target="apigw"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" style="strokeColor=#455A64;" edge="1" parent="1" source="apigw" target="alb"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e3" style="strokeColor=#455A64;" edge="1" parent="1" source="alb" target="users"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e4" style="strokeColor=#455A64;" edge="1" parent="1" source="alb" target="orders"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e5" style="strokeColor=#455A64;" edge="1" parent="1" source="alb" target="tracking"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e6" value="SQL (rw/ro)" style="strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#283593;" edge="1" parent="1" source="users" target="dbu"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e7" value="SQL (rw/ro)" style="strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#283593;" edge="1" parent="1" source="orders" target="dbo"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e8" value="SQL (rw/ro)" style="strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#283593;" edge="1" parent="1" source="tracking" target="dbt"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e9" value="gRPC" style="dashed=1;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontColor=#1B5E20;" edge="1" parent="1" source="users" target="orders"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e10" value="gRPC" style="dashed=1;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontColor=#1B5E20;" edge="1" parent="1" source="orders" target="tracking"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e11" value="emit USER_CREATED" style="strokeColor=#C2185B;fontColor=#880E4F;" edge="1" parent="1" source="users" target="sqs"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e12" value="emit ORDER_CREATED" style="strokeColor=#C2185B;fontColor=#880E4F;" edge="1" parent="1" source="orders" target="sqs"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e13" value="triggers" style="strokeColor=#D84315;fontColor=#BF360C;" edge="1" parent="1" source="sqs" target="lambda"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e14" value="persists events" style="strokeColor=#00838F;fontColor=#005662;" edge="1" parent="1" source="lambda" target="docdb"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e15" value="logs / metrics" style="dashed=1;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontColor=#4A148C;" edge="1" parent="1" source="tracking" target="cw"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e16" value="forward" style="strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontColor=#4A148C;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cw" target="signoz"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>
